title: NANA Announces 2021 Shareholder Dividend Distrubution
summary: On Oct. 28, 2021, the NANA Regional Corporation Inc. board authorized a contribution to the NRC Shareholder Trust for the purpose of paying a dividend for fiscal year 2021 to Trust beneficiaries of $10.75 per share, for a total distribution of approximately $18.49 million.
